data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an organizer override for manual approvals, but the provided evidence does not demonstrate this functionality. While the linked use case describes a scenario where the system warns the organizer about unpaid seats, it does not provide concrete evidence of an actual override mechanism being implemented or tested. The absence of specific evidence related to the override process indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of an organizer override mechanism for manual approvals.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
